name: PAY_BAL_EXCEPTIONS_VL
query: SELECT PBE.BAL_EXCEPTION_ID, PBE.REPORT_DEFINITION_ID, PBE.BASE_BAL_EXCEPTION_NAME BASE_BAL_EXCEPTION_NAME, PBE.ENTERPRISE_ID, PBE.LEGISLATION_CODE, PBE.VARIANCE_OPERATOR, PBE.OUTPUT_FORMAT, PBE.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, PBE.CURRENCY_CODE, PBE.DEFINED_BALANCE_ID, PBE.VARIANCE_TYPE, PBE.VARIANCE_VALUE, PBE.COMPARISON_TYPE, PBE.COMPARISON_VALUE, PBE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PBE.CREATED_BY, PBE.CREATION_DATE, PBE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PBE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PBE.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PBETL.BAL_EXCEPTION_NAME AS BAL_EXCEPTION_NAME, PBE.SEVERITY_LEVEL, PBE.FORMULA_ID, PBE.TARGET_DEFINED_BALANCE_ID, PBE.MODULE_ID, PBE.BALANCE_GROUP_ID FROM PAY_BAL_EXCEPTIONS_B PBE, PAY_BAL_EXCEPTIONS_TL PBETL WHERE PBETL.BAL_EXCEPTION_ID = PBE.BAL_EXCEPTION_ID AND PBETL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
